summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kaisō Sushi España reservation system. Backend APIs are 100% functional (14/14 tests passed). Frontend loads correctly but has critical calendar date selection issue preventing reservation completion.

critical_bugs.issue: Date selection not working - calendar displays dates but handleDateSelect function not triggered when dates are clicked
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks entire reservation flow - users cannot proceed past date selection

critical_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events preventing proper closure and navigation to other UI elements
critical_bugs.impact: Users get stuck in reservation wizard, cannot access admin panel

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and 'Reservar Mesa' button
All page sections visible (hero, about, hours, gallery, footer)
Calendar displays proper month and dates
Admin panel accessible and displays correctly
Cancel reservation page works with proper error handling
All backend APIs functional (100% success rate)
Dark theme and golden colors (#C9A24A) implemented correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix calendar date selection in ReservationWizard component - the react-day-picker onSelect handler is not working. Also fix modal overlay z-index issues preventing proper UI navigation.
